content_body:
Nothing says summer like the thrill of whitewater rafting, and Cascade Outdoors is one of our favorite outfitters. An easy day trip from Blue Ride, Cascade customizes its Ocoee Rafting trips to fit each group’s needs—be they hardcore enthusiasts aching to push the limits or nervous beginners who need a little more guidance. This company will help you organize your Ocoee Rafting trip—whether it is a family trip, youth group retreat, or a corporate team-building exercise—so you can create a unique and memorable experience that is right for your group.

Boasting class III and IV rapids (which are best described as large waves with significant rapids that include moderate drops), the Ocoee River promises a whitewater rafting trip that is sure to please both the young and the young at heart. Each group is joined by a professionally trained expert guide, with extensive whitewater experience, as well as CPR and first aid training. All of the trip leaders also have Wilderness First Responder and Advanced First Aid Certifications. Members of the staff have faced the rivers of India, Nepal, Costa Rica, New Zealand, Ecuador, and more, so they will be ready for whatever the Ocoee River throws their way.

In addition to rafting, there is camping available on the grounds for select groups. Cascade Outdoors will also share information about nearby hiking, horseback riding, mountain biking, or any other outdoor activities. All you have to do is ask!

Check out their website or give them a call at 1-800-338-7238.
title: Whitewater Rafting Near Blue Ridge, GA
